{{Infobox character
| name = Vall
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] is a three-star [[Titan]], a [[Spider]], and a [[Ghost]] in [[Cirian]]'s squad.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] scans for traces of her prey.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] uses shields of blue light for close combat.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Vall]] is a member of the [[Second Division]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
